new-york-cheesecake-argiro.name: New York Cheesecake

ingredients.item: 1/2 tb liquid vanilla or 1 vanillin capsule
1/2 tb liquid vanilla or 1 vanillin capsule

instructions: All materials at room temperature. Especially butter and cream cheese.
If you choose to use sour cream instead of yogurt your result will take off.
We butter cake form with detachable base preferably 20 million. You can use a 22 million form, but the oven cheesecake will be lower.
Place anti-stick paper on the base of the form and on the side.
Dress all the form externally with a piece of foil because we will bake in a ben marie oven.
Preheat the oven to 180°C in the air.

new-york-style-pizza-a-and-delicious-del.name: New York Style Pizza, A And Delicious Delicacy
new-york-style-pizza-a-and-delicious-del.original_name: Pizza estilo Nueva York, un manjar sencillo y delicioso

ingredients.item: 800 gr de tomates enlatados ((enteros o triturados))

instructions: We start by preparing the dough. In a bowl mix flour, sugar and pint of salt, integrating well the ingredients that are homogenous.
In another vessel, dissolve the leaven into warm water and add the flour mixture with olive oil. Fold the mixture for 10 minutes to get a soft and elastic mass.
Let the dough stand at a hot place and covered with a moist cloth for two hours or until its size doubles.
While we're waiting for the dough, we'll get the sauce ready. Warm olive oil in a large frying pan with medium heat. Add the chopped garlic and cook till fragrant, without letting it get too golden.
If you use canned whole tomatoes, get them into a blender and get a soft texture. If they are already crushed, simply add them to the frying pan with garlic and mix well.
To tomatoes, add sugar, salt, oregano and red pepper (if you are using them). Remove to combine all ingredients.
It reduces fire to low and cooks salsa with low heat for 30 to 40 minutes, stirring occasionally. Test the salsa, tighten the condiments as preferred and let cool.
Once you have ready the dough and salsa. It purifies the oven at 260 ″ 3 ″.
Stretch the dough onto a pitted surface and place it onto a baking plate.
Expand tomato sauce onto dough, sprinkle generously with mozzarella cheese and add herbs and spices to your taste.
Hornea for 15 minutes or till the dough is golden and the cheese melted and bubbling.
Deja reposar unos pocos minutos antes de servir para que los ingredientes se asienten muy bien. Sirve caliente.

no-bake-granola-bars.name: No Bake Granola Bars
instructions: Stir oats, peanut butter, flaxseed, honey, cranberries, chocolate chips, and almonds together in a bowl; press into a 9x11-inch baking dish, using the back of a spatula to press into a flat layer.
Refrigerate mixture at least 1 hour.
Cut into 12 bars and wrap each individually in plastic wrap for storage.

no-bake-cherry-cream-cheese-dessert.name: No-bake Cherry Cream Cheese Dessert
instructions: Combine cracker crumbs, butter, sugar, and salt in a bowl until all ingredients are mixed together well. Divide graham cracker mixture between 8 dessert dishes, about 2 tablespoons of mixture per dessert dish.

Beat cream cheese in a separate bowl with an electric mixer until smooth. Gradually add sweetened condensed milk and beat in until well blended. Beat in lemon juice and vanilla extract. Spoon 1/4 cup of cream cheese mixture into each dish on top of the graham crackers. Top each with 1/4 cup of the cherry pie filling.
Serve immediately or chill until ready to serve.

no-bake-cookies.name: No-bake Cookies
instructions: Line a large rimmed baking sheet with parchment paper or wax paper; set aside.

Toast ½ cup sliced almonds in a small, dry skillet over medium-high heat, shaking the pan frequently, until lightly browned and fragrant, 2–3 minutes. Be careful not burn them. Immediately transfer to a plate to cool.

Combine 6 oz. bittersweet chocolate (at least 60% cacao), chopped, ½ cup (100 g) sugar, 1 tsp. instant espresso powder, 6 Tbsp. unsalted butter, and ½ cup whole milk in a medium saucepan; stir over medium heat until chocolate and butter have melted and mixture is smooth. Stir in ⅔ cup (181 g) almond butter and 1 tsp. almond extract until smooth, then stir in 3 cups (339 g) rolled oats. Cook, stirring frequently, until oats are slightly softened, 3–5 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in reserved almonds and ½ cup unsweetened dried cherries, chopped, mixing well to combine.

Let cool slightly at room temperature, then scoop out the dough by rounded tablespoonsful and drop onto the prepared baking sheet. (Don’t worry about spacing them far apart; since they aren’t baked, they won’t spread.) Sprinkle the cookies with 2 Tbsp. flaky sea salt, then sift ¼ cup (21 g) unsweetened cocoa powder over the tops. Chill cookies until they have firmed up, at least 1 hour.
Do Ahead: Cookies can be made 2 weeks in advance. Refrigerate in an airtight container; or store in the freezer for several months.
Editor’s note: This no-bake cookie recipe first appeared on Epicurious in December 2011. Head this way for more of our favorite cookie recipes →

no-squeezy-cherry-limeade-pie.name: No-squeezy Cherry Limeade Pie
instructions: Beat cream cheese in a bowl using an electric mixer until smooth and creamy. Add limeade concentrate and sugar and beat until light and fluffy, at least 5 minutes. Spoon mixture into graham cracker crust; refrigerate until chilled, at least 4 hours.
Top pie with cherry pie filling and whipped cream.

nutritious-lentil-bread-comedera.name: Nutritious Lentil Bread
instructions: In a bowl, add lentil and salt. Revolves to integrate. Open up a space in the middle of the flour, Volcano type.
Add water, milk, two tablespoons of oil, yeast, baked lentils and broken nuts. With a spatula, mix very well.
You have to mix everything perfectly, this mass is very dense, so you integrate it perfectly will be vital to make the texture super ideal.
Let the mass rest at a warm place and at room temperature for 1 hour.
10 minutes to complete the rest process, pressurizes the oven at 180 degrees Celsius.
Fold your bread mold and pour the dough. When it's all in the bowl, give them some little tools to get them settled.
Baked for about 30 minutes till completely ready. Use the pat's technique, if you get wet you miss cooking, otherwise you'll be more than ready.
